data.title: 21Shares: Bitcoin is expected to rise to $138,500 by the end of the year, with macro resilience and on-chain data supporting rising expectations
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News 21Shares' latest analysis said that combining historical trends with current market signals, Bitcoin is expected to reach $138,555 by the end of 2025. The report pointed out that the world's largest cryptocurrency is gaining strength from macroeconomic uncertainty and on-chain momentum.
The report said that the current market cycle is similar to that of 2021. Bitcoin's recent price has shown resilience rather than panic.
21Shares pointed out that market-level crashes such as the collapse of Silicon Valley Bank no longer trigger panic selling. On the contrary, such shocks have further strengthened Bitcoin's role as a hedge against risks in the traditional financial system. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Brad Garlinghouse dismisses chances of an IPO in 2025
data.description:
Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has dismissed any chance of Ripple pursuing an Initial Public Offering (IPO) in 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/garlinghouse-dismisses-ipo-in-2025/

data.description:

data.title: US Banks See Profits Rise Despite Tariff Concerns Over Economic Outlook
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 19, 2025-Major US banks reported strong profits in the first quarter of 2025, surpassing analysts’ expectations. However, executives raised alarms over the economic impact of ongoing tariffs, warning of potential slowdowns in growth. While trading revenues surged, with record performances in equity markets at JPMorgan Chase and Morgan Stanley, industry leaders cautioned […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-banks-see-profits-rise-despite-tariff-concerns-over-economic-outlook

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 1,600 USDT with a 0.68% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 19, 2025, 13:23 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 1,600 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,600.969971 USDT, with a narrowed 0.68% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Mantra launches first real-time dashboard showing OM token supply details and more
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Mantra announced that the initial version of the first real-time dashboard has been launched. The dashboard is designed to provide a clear perspective and real-time data to show the supply of OM tokens, operating wallets, and other important on-chain asset holdings.
Dashboard V1 includes: a detailed disassembly of the EVM chain and the mainnet OM; links to relevant wallets.

data.title: What Is 'Idle Mine'? This Free iOS and Android Game Pays Real Bitcoin
data.description:
Mobile game Idle Mine lets you earn real Bitcoin for mining fake gems on iOS and Android. Here’s how it works.
source: https://decrypt.co/resources/what-is-idle-mine-ios-android-bitcoin-game

data.title: SkyAI announced that its public pre-sale will not retain any tokens or BNB earnings. Its pre-sale hard cap is 500 BNB, and it was eventually oversubscribed 167 times
A whale who went long on HYPE with 7.5 million USDC margin 3 times has made a floating profit of more than 5 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Yujin monitoring, a whale who used 7.5 million USDC as margin to go long on HYPE 3 times has now made a floating profit of 5.07 million US dollars. The average opening price of his long HYPE position on Hyperliquid since April 8 was 11.93 US dollars, while HYPE is now priced at 17.89 US dollars.
